# Mortgage Calculator 

## Summary
The Mortgage Calculator card provides a comprehensive tool for users to estimate the financial details of a mortgage, including the monthly payment, total lifetime costs, and breakdowns of various expenses. It allows users to input key factors such as home price, down payment, loan term, and interest rate, and then computes the resulting mortgage details.

## Import
```javascript
import { MortgageCalculator } from '../mortgage-calculator';
```

## Usage as a Field
The MortgageCalculator card can be used as a field within a consuming card or field. Here's an example:

```gts
export class MyCard extends CardDef {
  @field mortgageDetails = contains(MortgageCalculator);
}
```

In this case, the `mortgageDetails` field will contain an instance of the MortgageCalculator card, which can be accessed and displayed in templates.

## Template Usage
To display the MortgageCalculator card within a template, you can use the following pattern:

```hbs
<@fields.mortgageDetails @format="isolated" />
```

This will render the isolated format of the MortgageCalculator card, which provides a detailed view of the mortgage details. You can also use the `fitted` format to display the calculator in a more compact layout.

```hbs
<@fields.mortgageDetails @format="fitted" />
```

The MortgageCalculator card handles all the necessary computations and displays the results, making it a convenient and powerful tool for users to estimate their mortgage costs.
